positive: Minimalist symmetrical geometric mountain range silhouette, rising dramatically against a gradient sky of warm sunset oranges and deep indigo purples. The mountains should be composed of repeating, interlocking tessellations and clean, bold geometric shapes. Style: Modern, abstract vector art, negative space focus, high-contrast screen-print aesthetic. Composition: Centralized, balanced, perfect for tiling or repeating patterns. Lighting: Flat, strong directional backlighting emphasizing the silhouette's edge. Color: Limited palette of warm tertiary colors (terracotta, burnt orange, dusty lavender, deep navy) on a neutral cream background. High resolution, print-ready, graphic design quality, vectors.
